Notice Of Hearing On Motion To Amend Sanctions Order, Motion To Amend
Off Calendar Feb-19-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to Amend Sanction Order issued on 12/1/2003 to Michael Lacovara, Esq., of Sullivan & Cromwell, in the amount of $350.00, is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanction Order to be amended to reflect the name of Jamie E. Shapiro, Esq., instead of Michael Lacovara, Esq., Order signed. Proceedings reported by: Gena Eales, CSR 176. (212)
